g-0: ^Beavus: I don’t believe I’ve seen you around these here parts before.
g-1: ^Beavus: Ya know, you look like you could use some assistance, Friend.
g-2: ^Beavus: You want my Orb? I see.
g-3: ^Beavus: Well listen, this here Orb is quite a powerful object, capable of incredible feats.
g-4: ^Beavus: But you seem like a smart fella, so if it could help your situation, I am happy to donate to a good cause.
g-5: ^Beavus: Just be sure not to share the goods, ya hear?
